svg.title: StayAwakeBot GitHub Actions architecture
svg.desc: Flowchart showing the full URL health monitoring bot workflow from trigger to report

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I configure the cron schedule for the bot?')
sendPrompt('Can I manually trigger the bot from GitHub Actions?')
sendPrompt('What does push trigger do in the bot?')
sendPrompt('What goes inside the urls.yml config file for the bot?')
g.text: URLs, intervals, timeouts, expected status, alert thresholds

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the Python health checker script do step by step?')
g.text: HTTP requests · response time · status code · redirect chain

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What format does the bot use to write health reports?')
g.text: Markdown log · JSON summary · uptime % · timestamp

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the bot commit health reports back to the repo?')
sendPrompt('How do I set up alerting for the bot when a URL goes down?')
sendPrompt('How do I add a status badge to the README?')
